channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How to restore deleted text messages on Android
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals ways to restore accidentally deleted text messages on your Android phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: VW Group Models Affected in Data Breach, 800,000 Vehicles Exposed
item.description: A data breach affecting over 800,000 VW Group models has been reported, with more than half sharing precise GPS location data. The vulnerability was discovered by a European hacking organization and acknowledged by Cariad, a subsidiary of Volkswagen's automotive software." maxlengt="160
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Los mejores casos de éxito del 2024 constatan la alianza entre TI y negocio
item.description: La transformación digital ha formado parte inherente de las agendas de empresas, organizaciones e instituciones de diversa naturaleza y tipología.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Joby conducts first FAA testing under Type Inspection Authorization in simulator in Marina
item.description: Type Inspection Authorization testing is considered the final phase of the type certification process, which paves the way for an aircraft to begin commercial passenger operations, according to Joby.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: Netflix? More like Netfix - world's most popular streaming service is tied at the neck with its biggest rival, and doesn't even know how much it spends on cloud computing
item.description: Netflix relies on its rival’s technology to deliver its own service and doesn’t know how much it’s paying.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Tech investor Cathie Wood on how Trump can boost the U.S. economy
item.description: U.S. tech investor Cathie Wood is calling on Donald Trump’s incoming administration to boost economic growth and policy certainty by backdating promised corporate and personal tax cuts to Jan. 1, 2025, she told Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Why I’m skipping the PS5 Pro in 2025 and upgrading my gaming PC instead
item.description: I’m not buying a PS5 Pro in 2025 – instead I’m picking up a very long HDMI cable and a new GPU for my gaming PC.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: I just saw a sneak peek of Severance season 2 and Lumon's newest employees raise a lot of questions
item.description: Can't wait for Severance season 2? Apple TV Plus just released the first eight-minutes of the new season.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: 2024 review: ‘Typhoons’ bookend busy year in cyber
item.description: From Volt Typhoon to Salt Typhoon, major cyber incidents in 2024 shined a spotlight on how agencies are managing cyber threats to critical infrastructure. The post 2024 review: ‘Typhoons’ bookend busy year in cyber first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: What is an IT consultant? Roles, types, salaries, and how to become one
item.description: The IT function within organizations has become far more complex in recent years. Enterprise infrastructures have expanded far beyond the traditional ones focused on company-owned and -operated data centers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill
item.description: The latest authorization bill pushes the intelligence community to boost many of its workforce and tech efforts, including its public-private talent exchange. The post Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Google Maps is deleting location history soon, so act now to save your data
item.description: Google Maps is deleting location history soon. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson shows you how to back it up before it's gone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: YouTube TV price hike got you down? 5 free alternatives
item.description: Was YouTube TV’s recent price increase the straw that broke the camel’s back for you? When does the cost of streaming TV stop going up? When?!! The answer is: Never. These streaming services are going to keep creeping upward in cost until we’re all shelling out $300 a month. Enough is enough.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: The top Windows PC tips of 2024
item.description: The end of the year means it’s time to reflect on what’s really important in life: friends, family — and Windows PC tips. That may sound silly, but I’ve always believed it’s true.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TikTok is full of bogus, potentially dangerous medical advice
item.description: TikTok is the new doctor’s office, quickly becoming a go-to platform for medical advice. Unfortunately, much of that advice is sketchy at best. A new report by the healthcare software firm Tebra found 45% of medical advice on TikTok to be false or misleading.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: Navy looking at cloud as GFE to reduce CMMC burden
item.description: Jane Rathbun, the Department of the Navy’s CIO, said tools from NSA and NCIS along with a new initiative could help small firms meet CMMC requirements. The post Navy looking at cloud as GFE to reduce CMMC burden first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
